action.reasoning: Observation: recent runs had buggy/incomplete train.py leading to no stage2 improvement (val stuck ~0.52 after s1~0.54), best still 0.6537 from iter24 with proper cRT (Focal gamma2/sqrt-sampler/mix-cut-rand-p0.5/RandAug/s1-60ep-AdamW5e-4-cos + CE-ls0.1/count-sampler/s2-40ep-SGD0.05-nest/head-reinit/freeze-after-best-s1 + tau=1.7 grid val=0.644). Analysis: truncation missed key cRT elements (head reinit, named_param backbone-only freeze, count sampler in s2, per-stage opt/scheduler, step offsets for metrics, full loops). Model/predict stable (CIFAR-RN50, weights_only=False, batched norm+logit-adj+best_tau+counts). Decision: fully overwrite train.py with clean complete code matching iter24 success (+ls=0.1 in s2 CE, explicit reinit/freeze/offset-logging/Cosine-per-stage/seeds/mix-cut-rand-50% in s1/periodic-loss+per-epoch-val), run python train.py then submit_eval on best.pt (targets >=0.65, ~6min fits final iter/1h left, follows >20ep rule).
